visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit restaurant with warm indoor lighting and red-paneled walls. A young woman, the main character, is seated at a table wearing a white bucket hat, a blue sweater with a white lace collar, and a red plaid apron. She smiles warmly at a woman seated to her left who has long black hair and is wearing a lavender top. On the table are several white bowls, glasses of water, and a black paper cup. (2) The main character reaches into a small blue floral drawstring bag and pulls out a single white die and a black shaker cup. She begins counting a stack of 1000-unit currency notes, placing them on the black tablecloth. The lighting remains bright and consistent, emphasizing the textures of the fabric and the items on the table. (3) The camera pans slightly as a small white dog, a Maltese, appears resting near the woman in lavender. The main character demonstrates the dice game, shaking the black cup. Various text overlays in bold yellow and white appear at the top and bottom of the frame. (4) A man's hand enters the frame from the right, taking the black cup and rolling the die onto the table. The die lands on '2'. The main character picks up two currency notes and hands them to the off-screen person. (5) The woman in lavender then takes her turn, shaking the cup vigorously. The die rolls out and lands on '6'. She reacts with extreme joy, covering her face with her hands while the main character counts out six notes and hands them over. (6) A third person's hand enters to roll, resulting in a '3'. The main character hands over three notes. The video concludes with the main character gathering the remaining money and making a finger-heart gesture toward the camera with a satisfied smile.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 獎金自己骰. [Slogan]: 春酒18骰子. [Subtitle]: 因為我們今天來開心聚餐. (2) [Subtitle]: 我準備了一個小遊戲. [Subtitle]: 給我的三位好夥伴. (3) [Subtitle]: 有老比爾跟妹妹. [Subtitle]: 還有我們重要的新剪輯師. (4) [Variety]: 1點就是1000元獎金. [Variety]: 六點就是6000. [Variety]: 只有一次機會. (5) [Variety]: 2,000耶. [Subtitle]: 其實你蠻遜的. (6) [Variety]: 6,000. [Subtitle]: 你真的是狠人. (7) [Variety]: 3,000. [Subtitle]: 謝謝感謝大心.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female host, 1 female guest sitting next to her, and 2 male participants visible only by their hands and voices.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with shoulder-length black hair, wearing a white NY-branded bucket hat, a blue knitted sweater with a prominent white lace-edged collar, and a red and white checkered apron.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A traditional high-end restaurant interior featuring red lacquered pillars, brick-patterned walls, and warm ambient lighting. Tables are covered with black cloths and set with white porcelain tableware and clear glassware.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat electronic pop music with a steady 4/4 beat begins. A cheerful female voice introduces the scene with high pitch variability and rapid speech. Soft ambient restaurant chatter is audible in the background. (2) A sharp 'plastic rustle' occurs as a bag is handled, followed by the metallic 'tink' of a cup hitting a table. A comedic 'boing' sound effect plays when a die is shown. (3) As the first die roll occurs, a hollow percussive 'clack' of the die hitting the table is heard, followed immediately by an excited 'ding' chime when the result is revealed. Laughter and cheering from multiple voices ensue. (4) During the second roll, the music maintains its tempo. A 'whoosh' transition SFX accompanies a camera movement. When the die hits '6', an explosive cheer and a bright synthesizer 'stinger' emphasize the high-arousal emotional moment. (5) The final roll features another percussive die sound and a celebratory bell chime. The female host's voice remains dominant and joyful, concluding with a warm closing statement as the music fades out with a final upbeat chord.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Rules -> Iterative Action (Rolls 1-3) -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To document a fun and generous team-building activity ('Spring Party') where the host provides cash bonuses to employees based on a game of chance, fostering a positive brand image and entertaining the audience.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses typical social-media 'variety show' editing with large text overlays and frequent sound effects to enhance the comedic and celebratory atmosphere of a corporate dinner.
